creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #10)
As far as I can tell they should be fine (needs proper runtime testing) but I'm not sure however how version dependant ldb is.
I've only briefly tested Samba 4.13 (without ldb support) and it seems to work but it would be nice if a few others also could test, Timur might also have some valuable input regarding this.
